name: lorem-forge-mcp
description: MCP server for generating placeholder data — lorem ipsum, fake names, emails, addresses, phone numbers, company names. Zero external deps.

tools.name: generate_lorem
tools.description: Generate lorem ipsum text. Choose paragraphs, sentences, or words.

tools.name: generate_fake_data
tools.description: Generate fake placeholder data — names, emails, phone numbers, addresses, companies. Great for testing.

tools.name: generate_json_data
tools.description: Generate an array of fake JSON objects with specified fields. Perfect for API mocking.
